projects.title: Banking Transaction Backend API
projects.desc: Secure banking backend built with Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, JWT Authentication, Docker, and REST APIs featuring multi-account management, idempotent fund transfers, and deployed on AWS EC2 & Render.

projects.title: AI-Powered Delivery Failure Prediction System
projects.desc: Machine learning system using XGBoost (96.18% validation accuracy) with a 61-feature pipeline and React + FastAPI dashboard for real-time delivery risk prediction.

projects.title: Prodivity Technologies
projects.desc: Full-stack MERN platform for a freelance agency with secure admin dashboard, REST APIs, MongoDB, authentication, and dynamic content management.

projects.title: Deep Learning Malaria Detection System
projects.desc: ResNet-18 based deep learning application with FastAPI backend and React frontend for malaria diagnosis using microscopic blood smear images.

achievements.title: Open Source & Version Control
achievements.desc: Built and maintained multiple production-ready full-stack and backend projects using Git, GitHub, Docker, AWS EC2, Render, and modern development workflows.
